Indian Maritime University Common Entran.official_note: Official IMU results/merit-list page on imu.edu.in (results + counselling rank lists published in PDF after each round). Fetcher hit a TLS 'unable to verify first certificate' error; domain and page confirmed via search.

Jain Entrance Test.official_note: Official JET results portal (set.jainuniversity.ac.in) publishing JET merit lists (day/session-wise PDFs), scholarship lists and merit-counselling lists for B.Tech admissions. Jain publishes cutoffs alongside results rather than a fixed table. Replaces generic jainuniversity.ac.in/jet.

Jamia Millia Islamia Engineering Entranc.official_note: Official JMI admission portal declared-results page listing entrance results/merit (rank) lists; B.Tech merit/cutoff lists are published here (JMI B.Tech now via JEE Main rank list). More specific than admission.jmi.ac.in homepage.

Jharkhand Combined Entrance Competitive.official_note: Official JCECEB counselling page listing counselling notices and round-wise seat-allotment/cutoff PDFs (jceceb.jharkhand.gov.in/IMP_l/*.pdf). Gov server timed out on fetch; official domain and counselling page confirmed via search. More specific than the homepage.

Joint Entrance Examination Advanced IIT.official_note: Official JoSAA opening & closing ranks (OR-CR) archive (2016-2025), filterable by year/round/institute/program/category. For IITs ranks are JEE Advanced AIR. Direct cutoff page, better than josaa.nic.in/or-cr generic.

Joint Entrance Examination CSAB NEUT Nor.official_note: Official CSAB NEUT Opening and Closing Rank document category on csab.nic.in. Page loads but currently shows 'No Documents found' (off-season; populated when NEUT round OR-CR PDFs are released). Official CSAB domain confirmed.

Joint Entrance Examination CSAB Special.official_note: Official CSAB Special Round page on csab.nic.in linking to 'CSAB Special Opening and Closing Ranks' (admissions.nic.in/csabspl OR-CR archive) plus brochures/schedules. Cutoffs published as OR-CR per round.
